## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss article performance, content updates, and strategy refinements for GrowthX's content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Post-holiday uptick in clicks and impressions, with early positive signals for key queries](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [17 articles published (9 refreshes, 8 new); 7 ready for review, 11 in progress](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Shift in strategy: more focus on refreshes, less on new content](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Need for improved quality control: link checking, competitor avoidance, and refined brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Significant uptick in clicks and impressions post-holiday slump](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Top-performing queries: targeted marketing, B2B demand generation, ABM LinkedIn ads](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Too early for conclusive data on refreshed content performance](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Request to use comparison feature in future meetings for tracking position changes](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Content Production Status

  - [17 articles published (9 refreshes, 8 new)](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [7 assignments ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [5 new assignments and 6 refreshes in progress](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Anthony to complete reviews today; Sadira to publish tomorrow after edits](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Shift towards more refreshes, fewer new articles](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [20 new refresh candidates added based on Google Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Criteria for refresh selection: losing position/impressions, previously high-ranking content that dropped off](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Future consideration: content consolidation to maximize value](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Quality Control Improvements

  - [Refined brand guidelines in AirOps for improved AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Emphasis on reducing fluff, repetitive structures, and improving overall quality](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Request to check all internal links before publishing to avoid 404 errors](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing AI-generated content with human intervention](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Workflow and Feedback Process

  - [Explanation of AirOps workflow and transition to API-based approach](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Discussion on incorporating feedback into brand guidelines for future content](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [Acknowledgment of challenges in positioning GrowthX as both an agency and SaaS tool provider](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to create a list of competitor URLs to avoid linking to in content](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Team to be more selective with external links, focusing on authoritative sources](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [Anthony to address the Elementor-created page issue with the dev team](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [Implement stricter link-checking process before content moves to review stage](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Continue refining brand guidelines based on ongoing feedback and learnings](https://fathom.video/share/nsVjSV1eP_Sfoni7fo1Drf5E9A8VzwEh?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
